◎简　　介  

　　In WWII, Czechoslovakia split into the Slovak State and the Protectorate of Bohemia and Moravia. Former pilot Viktor Lesa works for the Slovak Railway Mail and often comes to the border town of Ludendorf, the former Czech town of Breclav. In order to impress a young female colleague, he redirects an important package. The Gestapo shows up in the town and Lesa together with a Je...
